docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BUBAKAR, LEJOSEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BUBAKAR, LEJOSEN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
